title: cucubalus fasciculatus
intro: Cucubalus fasciculatus, also known as the Alpine Bittercress or Snow Buttercup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. The medicinal properties of Cucubalus fasciculatus are attributed to its leaves and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Cucubalus fasciculatus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with some herbalists also using its roots to make a decoction for medicinal purposes.
